title: Sonic Boom
description: a useless client side mod that makes an "explosion" when a player get above the speed of 40 blk/sec or 2blk/tick
body:
## Sonic Boom - a useless client side mod
40 blk/sec => **EXPLOSION**

This mod will make you (and other every player) explode if flying over 40 blk/sec with elytras 
[ please note that the explosion is not real it's just visual and sound and is purely client side ]

this mod was made for EGGY
